---
title: "Projects"
description: "// portfolio of pipelines, tutorials, and analyses"
page-layout: full
title-block-style: default
listing:
  contents: ["*/index.qmd"]
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, categories, date]
  image-height: 200px
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
toc: false
---
